.github/workflows/codeql-analysis.yml.general_idea: Update the CodeQL analysis workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17.

.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17 for the build environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may fail to compile or recognize JDK 21 language features and class files.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the unified release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with JDK 21 can lead to mismatched boot classpaths or warnings; release is the standard for modern JDKs.
